Ron McMorris

Dr. Ron McMorris is a board-certified chiropractic neurologist and Fellow of the American College of Functional Neurology (FACFN) with advanced post-doctoral training in functional neurology, concussion management, traumatic brain injury rehabilitation, vestibular disorders, and neurorehabilitation. A lifelong resident of Livingston Parish, Louisiana, Dr. McMorris earned his undergraduate degree in Athletic Training from Southeastern Louisiana University and has been in clinical practice since 2007. He has also served in several elected leadership positions within the chiropractic profession and his local community.

Clinic Information:

My Elite Chiro

Phone Number: 225-271-4083

Website: www.MyEliteChiro.com

City: Livingston

State/Province: Louisiana

Country: United States

Clinic Summary:


Dr. McMorris is the founder of Neuro Connections and Elite Chiropractic in Louisiana, where he focuses on the evaluation and treatment of complex neurological and musculoskeletal conditions through an integrative, neuroplasticity-based approach. He utilizes advanced neurological diagnostics, cognitive and vestibular rehabilitation, oculomotor therapy, neurofeedback, autonomic regulation strategies, and functional rehabilitation programs to help improve patient function and quality of life by improving the functional integrity of the spine. He regularly collaborates with neurologists, neuro-optometrists, speech pathologist, mental health therapists, physical therapist and other healthcare providers in the management of concussion and complex neurological cases.

Contact

American College of
Functional Neurology
PO Box 247
Cape Canaveral, FL 32920

Email: secretary@acfn.org
